zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry De Erdington於1274年出生在英國瓦維其可爾艾爾丁頓時，他的父親William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury26歲，母親Maud Somery38歲。他於1315年6月15日與Joan de Wolvey在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1343年在他的家鄉享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry De Erdington于1274年出生在英国瓦維其可爾艾爾丁頓时，他的父亲William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury26岁，母亲Maud Somery38岁。他于1315年6月15日与Joan de Wolvey在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1343年在他的家乡享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Erdington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Edington
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Edington in Northumberland, Somerset, and Wiltshire, or from Eddington, Berkshire. Edington in Northumberland arises from Old English Idingtūn, from the Old English personal name Ida, + ing, denoting association, + tūn ‘settlement’ (compare Ida ). In Somerset, the name comes either from the Old English male name Ēadwine or from the feminine Ēadwynn + ing + tūn. Edington (Wiltshire) is from either the Old English personal name Ētha + dūn ‘hill’, or from Old English ēthe ‘uncultivated’ + dūn.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry De Erdington was born in 1274, in Erdington, Warwickshire, England, his father, William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury, was 26 and his mother, Maud Somery, was 38. He married Joan de Wolvey on 15 June 1315, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1343, in his hometown, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry De Erdington est né en 1274, à Erdington, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, William Henry d’Erdington Lord of Shawbury, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maud Somery, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Wolvey le 15 juin 1315, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1343, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry De Erdington 1274 in Erdington, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury 26 und seine Mutter Maud Somery 38. Er hat am 15. Juni 1315 in Warwickshire, England Joan de Wolvey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1343 im Alter von 69 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Erdington è nato il nel 1274 nel Erdington, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Maud Somery, aveva 38 anni. Lui sposato Joan de Wolvey il 15 giugno 1315, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1343, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry De Erdingtonが1274年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアエルディントンで生まれた時，父William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawburyは26歳，母Maud Someryは38歳であった。1315年6月15日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでJoan de Wolveyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1343年に故郷で69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry De Erdington(이)가 1274년 영국 워윅실르 르딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud Somery(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1315년 6월 15일 영국 워윅실르에서 Joan de Wolvey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1343년 그의 고향에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry De Erdington nasceu em 1274, em Erdington, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maud Somery, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Wolvey em 15 de junho de 1315, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1343, em sua cidade natal, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry De Erdington родился в 1274 г. в местности эрдингтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Henry de Erdington Lord of Shawbury было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud Somery, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Wolvey 15 июня 1315 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1343 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 69 лет.
